title: Publication
description: A public communication published by the NYC Law Department — a press release, a speech, or a published column. One canonical schema reconciling three parallel Open Data datasets that share the same shape (a title, a date, a linked PDF): 'LAW Press Releases' (kewa-q4dq), 'LAW Speeches' (g7ir-4pf8), and 'LAW Published Columns' (d84z-5kap).

publicationType.description: Which of the three parallel Law Department publication datasets this row comes from.

title.description: Title ('Press Release Title' / 'Law Speech Title' / 'Columns Title').

date.description: Publication / delivery date ('Press Release Date' / 'Date of Speech' / 'Column Date').

pdfUrl.description: Link to the PDF ('Link to PDF File').
